title: astragalus caroli-henrici
intro: Astragalus caroli-henrici, also known as the Chinese milkvetch, is a plant species within the pea family that is native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help to boost the immune system and protect against oxidative stress. The health benefits of Astragalus caroli-henrici include reduced fatigue and improved physical performance, as well as potential anti-viral and anti-bacterial properties that can help to combat infections and promote overall well-being. Astragalus caroli-henrici can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
